records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate only if an official Greek authority announces a renewed domestic horse-racing system.
records.blocked_reason: The official 2024 annual report states that the organization and conduct of Greek horse races ceased on 30 January 2024.
limitations: The cessation date is archive context only.
Foreign-race betting activity is not a domestic racing calendar.
No current meeting fields are approved.
records.notes: Publish an archive page and exclude Greece from current-calendar listings.
